name: Dennis Ritchie
why_notable: Co-created Unix with Ken Thompson. Created the C programming language. Nearly every security tool in existence is written in C, Go, Python, or Rust — all of which trace their lineage directly to C and Unix. He died October 2011, two days after Steve Jobs, and received a fraction of the public attention despite having arguably more impact on how computing actually works. The kernel you run Kali on, the socket primitives your tools call — his design decisions, still.
